Jackass: Number Two (2006)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $72,778,712Details
International Box Office $12,500,000
Worldwide Box Office $85,278,712
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $49,309,784
Total $49,309,784
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Daredevils go for the gross-out when they subject an unsuspecting public to more outrageous stunts and practical jokes. Danger, pain and bodily fluids are in plentiful supply as the gang tries to up the ante in the continuous quest to shock and annoy.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$29,002,002 (39.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.51 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:85.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$11,000,000 (worldwide box office is 7.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,059 opening theaters/3,063 max. theaters, 4.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $132,890,598

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 22nd, 2006 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
Video Release: December 26th, 2006 by Paramount Home Video, released as Jackass - Number Two
MPA Rating: R for extremely crude and dangerous stunts throughout, sexual content, nudity and language.
Running Time: 92 minutes
Franchise: Jackass
Plot point: Stuntman
Social setting: Extreme Sports
Subgenre: Farcical / Slapstick Comedy
Source:Based on TV
Genre:Reality
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Factual
Production/Financing Companies: Paramount Pictures, MTV Films, Dickhouse, Lynch Siderow Productions Inc
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
